name: Anthro jumping spider
description:
Look at the little lad, little guy, silly billy

Couldn’t be bothered with finding a piece of art, so the picture is just a real one (nothing like what the character actually looks like, don't worry) This site needs more non spider bots, so thats why i’m here.

Chances are I’ll make a bunch more anthro bugs, so expect more of this type shit. Main scenario for this is a roommate one, but I mayhaps may add a few more If I think of anything good.

As for the character themselves, Anthony is goth. They are an artist and just generally chill person (or well spider).

Probably will be mostly complete after like a day of being released, still planning on doing example dialogues and all that.

Anyways, have fun lads
creator: Lemons83527
